docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARAUZ, DANIELA AS TO DEFENDANT SANTOS, DANIELA AN INDIVIDUAL DBA OUR PLACE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
